footer.description: Sunnah Cure is a trusted diagnostic center offering holistic healing services including Hijama, Ruqyah, Counseling, and comprehensive health assessments.

hero.title: Your Path to Holistic Healing
hero.subtitle: Experience the power of Prophetic medicine combined with modern diagnostics. Book appointments for Hijama, Ruqyah, Counseling, and comprehensive health assessments.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive healing solutions combining traditional Prophetic medicine with modern healthcare practices.

hijama.title: Hijama Therapy
hijama.description: Professional cupping therapy following Sunnah practices. Wet and dry cupping available for various health conditions.

ruqyah.title: Ruqyah Therapy
ruqyah.description: Quranic healing sessions for spiritual ailments. Available in-person only with experienced practitioners.

counseling.title: Islamic Counseling
counseling.description: Faith-based counseling services for mental health, family issues, and personal development.

assessment.title: Health Assessment
assessment.description: Comprehensive diagnostic assessment covering physical, mental, and spiritual well-being.

about.title: About Sunnah Cure
about.subtitle: Trusted Healthcare with Faith
about.description: We are a dedicated diagnostic center combining the wisdom of Prophetic medicine with modern healthcare practices. Our team of qualified practitioners provides personalized care in a warm, welcoming environment.
about.mission: Our mission is to provide accessible, faith-based healthcare that nurtures the body, mind, and soul.

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Book your appointment in just a few simple steps.
howItWorks.step1Description: Browse our services and select the one that best fits your needs.
howItWorks.step2Description: Pick a convenient date and time, and fill in your details.
howItWorks.step3Description: Visit our center or join online for your scheduled appointment.
howItWorks.step4Description: Receive follow-up care and track your progress through your dashboard.

testimonials.title: What Our Patients Say
testimonials.subtitle: Real experiences from people who trusted us with their care.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to commonly asked questions about our services.
faq.a1: Hijama (cupping therapy) is a Prophetic medicine practice that involves placing cups on the skin to create suction, which helps improve blood flow, reduce pain, and promote healing.
faq.a2: No, Ruqyah therapy is only available as an in-person service at our center. This ensures the most effective and authentic healing experience with our practitioners.
faq.q3: How do I book an appointment?
faq.a3: Simply create an account, choose your desired service, select a time slot, and confirm your booking. You can pay online for online sessions.
faq.q4: What payment methods do you accept?
faq.a4: We accept bKash, Nagad, Rocket, PayPal, Stripe, and credit/debit cards for online payments. Cash payments are accepted at the center.
faq.q5: How long does an assessment take?
faq.a5: The comprehensive health assessment takes approximately 30-45 minutes to complete. You will receive your results and recommendations within 24-48 hours.

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Healing Journey?
cta.subtitle: Book your appointment today and take the first step towards holistic well-being.
